title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Indigo Paints - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Indigo Paints - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Indigo Paints are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Indigo Paints:
Indigo Paints is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indigo Paints!
